title: abutilon andrieuxii
intro: Abutilon andrieuxii, also known as the Mexican flower tree or flower of the gods, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Abutilon andrieuxii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal preparations for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
